ddls:
CREATE TABLE "food_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the food entity (e.g., Apples, Bananas, Barley) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code associated with the food entity (if applicable) */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the food entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of food entity (e.g., fruit, vegetable, grain) */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the food entity */,
  "origin_region" TEXT /* Region within the country of origin */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer or supplier */,
  "producer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the producer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the food entity has (e.g., organic, fair trade) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission category */,
  "category_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emission category */,
  "category_impact_factor" REAL /* Factor indicating the relative impact of the emission category on the environment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food entity the emission belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the emission data was recorded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission category to which the emission belongs */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of the emission */,
  "emission_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emission value */,
  "emission_source" TEXT /* Source of the emission data */,
  "emission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the emission data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the emission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES food_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES emission_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the emission data was recorded */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
